snippets.title: Mount Drive and check the GPU
snippets.code:
from google.colab import drive
drive.mount('/content/drive')        # persist files across sessions

!nvidia-smi                           # confirm a GPU is attached
import torch; print(torch.cuda.is_available())
snippets.explanation: Drive gives durable storage; nvidia-smi / torch.cuda confirm the accelerator runtime.

snippets.title: Read an API key from Colab Secrets
snippets.code:
from google.colab import userdata
api_key = userdata.get('OPENAI_API_KEY')   # set in the Secrets panel

import os
os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'] = api_key
snippets.explanation: Secrets keeps the key out of the notebook; expose it as an env var for SDKs that expect one.

snippets.title: Re-install per session
snippets.code: %pip install -q openai tiktoken      # re-run each new session; the VM resets
snippets.explanation: Because the runtime is ephemeral, extra packages must be re-installed in each fresh session.
